reviews.review_title: Im the owner of this game
reviews.review_description: Im the owner this is one of the best games i hope you guys have fun playing it!

I got banned my reason was for being under age but I wasn't toxic and I already got banned from the discord the community was good but the reason for the one star was bc I got banned in game and in discord for being 12 and there are many other ppl under age my ban is done in 2 days
First very bad quality you cant tag anyone either while that the entire community are moderators and it has too much speed boost

developer_response.body:
Yooooooo thanks for reaching out!! Im aware of this issue it is being fixed as soon as possible!

kind regards - Lucid taggers ownership team!

reviews.review_description: Servers were good till froggyVR (a mod) kicked a owner from playfab and shut down all servers so wait a few hours from now and servers will be back up

for the mods and owner of the game I love this even tho can y'all a a slight speed boost whenever you update the game but this is a five star also I got to meet icyy I hope icyy sees this by name in game is NOTFAST

reviews.review_title: JAY IS BANNING PEOPLE FOR NO REASON

reviews.review_description: Before my friend told me about his game, I expected it to be a boring, unoriginal game. Fortunately, I was incorrect and now love the game. Kudos to Icyy!
This game is a fun game you can play comp for. I would recommend 10/10
